name: sshfling-dart-server-consumer
description: Dart server process invoking a Node bridge to the SSHFling npm API.

scripts.test:dart: dart pub get --offline && dart compile exe bin/sshfling_consumer.dart -o bin/sshfling-dart-consumer && ./bin/sshfling-dart-consumer
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:dart
